flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Alpena Community College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (56.7% → 50.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Alpena Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Alpena Community College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (41.6% → 51.5%).
